title: His Comfort.
content:
The only comfort of my life
    Is, that I never yet had wife;
    Nor will hereafter; since I know
    Who weds, o'er-buys his weal with woe
meaning:
"His Comfort." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
